next_video_brief.hook: What if I told you that black holes are not just empty space?
next_video_brief.script_direction: Create an engaging and informative video that explores the science behind black holes, including their formation, characteristics, and effects on the universe. Use visual aids and examples to make the topic more accessible and interesting to viewers.
next_video_brief.title: The Mind-Blowing Truth About Black Holes

strategic_recommendations: Increase upload frequency to at least 3 times a week to improve consistency and engagement

Collaborate with other creators or experts in the field to create high-quality and informative content
